Front Porch.Body: Meow! You are sitting on the front porch facing the door with a sign that says 'DEMOLITION PENDING FIVE DAYS'. You need to get out of here before this old abandoned house is demolished, or you'll be gone along with the house! My oh my, but you notice fur; you feel warm and... abnormally short. Just what have you become? Paws, a nice fur coat, a stunning tail, and a collar around your neck; you're a cat! 'meeeowwwww'~

Living Room.Body: You slide into the cat door and enter the living room. Old and rusty, but it has it's charm. You look around this room once filled with life.

Main Gate.Body: The towering gates stand before you. It's inpenetrible. But there's a keyhole!

Backyard.Body: A luscius green backyard with some amazing scenery! Seems like you were an explorer, there's a small cat hut and food bowls outside. But wait, there's also a huge beautiful pond!

Items.description: You hop on the rubber floatie. It squeaks.
You paddle over and fish out a brass key!

Staircase.Body: You walk up the staircase and see photos and more photos hanging on the wall. Photos of you, the cat, as part of this family. One where you were just a baby, and one on your third birthday!

Garage.Body: It's dark and dusty in here with so many random things scattered all over the place from excersise equipment to old matresses.

Items.description: You find another key... what does this unlock?

Master Bedroom.Body: It's dark and dusty in here with so many random things scattered all over the place from excersise equipment to old matresses.

Items.description: zzz...zzzzzzz...you doze off. Memories come to mind~ sleeping with your human family and the love that you shared with them, playing with them and your favorite cat toy, an orange slinky worm. But the memories dissapate and you open your eyes again

Beyond.Body: Purrr-fect! The door has opened and you have escaped demolition. Cats are a very wholesome addition to family life and it means a lot to the cat and the human! ₍^. .^₎⟆
